name: Vestel Elektronik Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
summary: Vestel Elektronik Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi, together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells brown and white goods in Turkey. The company operates through three segments: Television and Electronic Devices, White Goods, and Other. The company provides refrigerators, washing machines, tumble dryers, cookers, ovens, water heaters, dishwashers, and air-conditioners. It also offers televisions; set-top boxes (STB); visual solutions; smartphones and tablets; LED lighting; smart home, smart walking stick, smart mirror, integrated television STB, smart test platform, user experience and interface cloud architecture, artificial intelligence, and cyber security solutions; and electric vehicle charging stations. The company markets and sells its products under the Vestel brand name. It sells its products through 976 Vestel stores, 886 Regal sales points, 9 Vs outlets, and online sales stores, as well as through household stores, technology retailers, hypermarkets, and e-commerce sites. The company also exports its products to Europe and internationally. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Vestel Elektronik Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi is a subsidiary of Zorlu Holding A.S.
